version: "2.x"

# Magento 2.x — Tech Pack

## 1. Fingerprinting Signals

| Signal | Type | Value | Confidence |
|--------|------|-------|------------|
| `X-Magento-Tags` response header | HTTP header | any value | Definitive |
| `X-Magento-Cache-Id` response header | HTTP header | any value | Definitive |
| `X-Magento-Vary` cookie | Cookie | any value | High |
| `mage-cache-sessid` cookie | Cookie | exact name | High |
| `mage-cache-storage` localStorage key | JS storage | exact name | High |
| `form_key` hidden field in HTML | HTML substring | `name="form_key"` | High |
| `/pub/static/` in script/link paths | HTML substring | `/pub/static/` | High |
| `/static/version{hash}/frontend/` in paths | HTML substring | `/static/version` | High |
| `require.js` / RequireJS loaded | HTML script | `require.js` or `requirejs` | Medium |
| `window.require` JS global with Magento config | JS global | `window.require` | High |
| `data-mage-init` attributes in HTML | HTML attribute | `data-mage-init` | High |
| `Mage_` prefixed JS component names | JS inline | `Mage_` | High |
| `Mage.Cookies` in inline JS | JS inline | `Mage.Cookies` | High |
| Wappalyzer result | MCP | `"Magento"` | Definitive |
| `GET /magento_version` returns JSON | HTTP endpoint | `{"version":"2.x.x"}` | Version |

**Version extraction:**
```bash
curl -s {site}/magento_version
# Returns: {"version":"2.4.7","edition":"Community"}

# Also check meta generator or inline JS:
curl -s {site} | grep -oP 'Magento/\K[0-9.]+'

# Check static path for version hint:
curl -s {site} | grep -oP '/static/version\K[^/]+'
```

## 2. Default API Surfaces

| Endpoint | Method | Auth | Notes |
|----------|--------|------|-------|
| `/rest/V1/store/storeViews` | GET | None | Lists all store views with codes and IDs |
| `/rest/V1/store/storeConfigs` | GET | None | Base URL, locale, currency, timezone per store |
| `/rest/V1/directory/countries` | GET | None | Full country list with region data |
| `/rest/V1/directory/currency` | GET | None | Base and allowed currencies |
| `/rest/V1/categories` | GET | None | Full category tree |
| `/rest/V1/categories/{id}` | GET | None | Single category with children |
| `/rest/V1/products` | GET | Bearer | Product catalog — requires auth in most production configs |
| `/rest/V1/products/{sku}` | GET | Bearer | Single product by SKU |
| `/rest/V1/configurable-products/{sku}/children` | GET | Bearer | Child products of a configurable |
| `/rest/V1/search` | GET | None | Elasticsearch-backed product search |
| `/rest/V1/cmsPage/search` | GET | None | CMS pages search (often public) |
| `/rest/V1/cmsBlock/search` | GET | None | CMS blocks search |
| `/graphql` | POST | None* | GraphQL endpoint (Magento 2.3+); *auth for private data |
| `/rest/V1/integration/admin/token` | POST | Credentials | Generate admin Bearer token |
| `/rest/V1/integration/customer/token` | POST | Credentials | Generate customer Bearer token |
| `/rest/V1/guest-carts` | POST | None | Create guest cart; returns cartId UUID |
| `/rest/V1/guest-carts/{cartId}/items` | GET/POST | Cart token | Guest cart item operations |
| `/rest/V1/guest-carts/{cartId}/totals` | GET | Cart token | Guest cart totals with tax breakdown |
| `/rest/all/V1/store/storeViews` | GET | None | Same as above but using `all` store scope |

## 3. Config / Constants Locations

| Location | What's there | How to access |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| `window.BASE_URL` | Site base URL | JS eval in browser |
| `window.FORM_KEY` | CSRF form key for the session | JS eval in browser |
| `window.require.s.contexts._` | RequireJS config: module paths, base URL, bundles | JS eval in browser |
| `/rest/V1/store/storeConfigs` | Locale, currency, timezone, theme, base_url per store | Public GET |
| `app/etc/env.php` | DB credentials, cache backend, crypt key | Source/server only |
| `app/etc/config.php` | Enabled modules list, scopes | Source/server only |
| `pub/static/.../requirejs-bundle-config.json` | RequireJS bundle manifest | Public GET (path varies by theme) |
| Inline `<script>` with `window.checkoutConfig` | Checkout payment methods, quote data | HTML scrape on checkout page |
| `data-mage-init` JSON attributes | Per-component JS config | HTML scrape |

## 4. Auth Patterns

| Pattern | Location | Notes |
|---------|----------|-------|
| Bearer token (admin) | `Authorization: Bearer {token}` header | Obtained via POST to `/rest/V1/integration/admin/token`; expires 4h by default |
| Bearer token (customer) | `Authorization: Bearer {token}` header | Obtained via POST to `/rest/V1/integration/customer/token`; longer TTL |
| Guest cart token | UUID in URL path | Returned from POST `/rest/V1/guest-carts`; used as `{cartId}` in cart endpoints |
| OAuth 1.0a | OAuth signature headers | For registered integrations; configured in Admin > System > Integrations |
| Form key (CSRF) | `form_key` POST param or `X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest` | Required for all web form POST and AJAX calls |
| Cookie session | `PHPSESSID` + `frontend` cookie | Browser session; not usable for REST API directly |

**Admin token acquisition:**
```bash
curl -s -X POST {site}/rest/V1/integration/admin/token \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"username":"admin","password":"your-password"}'
# Returns: "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
```

**Customer token acquisition:**
```bash
curl -s -X POST {site}/rest/V1/integration/customer/token \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"username":"customer@example.com","password":"password"}'
# Returns: "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
```

**GraphQL with store header:**
```bash
curl -s -X POST {site}/graphql \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Store: default" \
  -d '{"query":"{ storeConfig { store_code base_url locale } }"}'
```

## 5. JS Bundle Patterns

| Path | Content |
|------|---------|
| `/pub/static/version{N}/frontend/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/js/bundle/bundle.js` | Main compiled JS bundle (Magento 2.4+) |
| `/pub/static/version{N}/frontend/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/requirejs-bundle-config.json` | RequireJS bundle manifest — lists all bundles and their modules |
| `/pub/static/version{N}/frontend/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/mage/bootstrap.js` | Magento bootstrap / RequireJS init |
| `/pub/static/version{N}/frontend/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/Magento_Ui/js/lib/ko/initialize.js` | KnockoutJS initialization |
| `/pub/static/version{N}/adminhtml/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/` | Admin panel static assets (separate path) |
| `/pub/static/version{N}/frontend/{Vendor}/{theme}/{locale}/Magento_Checkout/js/view/` | Checkout UI component JS |

Check each bundle URL + `.map` suffix for source maps. The `version{N}` segment is a deployment stamp that increments on `bin/magento setup:static-content:deploy`.

## 6. Source Map Patterns

Magento 2 core JS files do NOT include source maps in production deployments.
Custom themes compiled via Grunt/webpack/Vite MAY include source maps.

Check strategy:
- Fetch `requirejs-bundle-config.json` to enumerate all bundle file paths.
- For each bundle, try appending `.map` — a `200` response means source maps are exposed.
- Theme JS at `/pub/static/.../js/*.js` — check `//# sourceMappingURL=` comment at end of file.
- Admin panel bundles at `/pub/static/.../adminhtml/` follow the same pattern.

If source maps are present, they will expose original TypeScript/ES6 source paths, component names, and internal module structure.

## 7. Common Modules & Extensions

| Module / Extension | API it adds | Detection signal |
|--------------------|------------|-----------------|
| `Magento_Catalog` | `/rest/V1/products`, `/rest/V1/categories` | Core; always present |
| `Magento_Checkout` | `/rest/V1/guest-carts`, `/rest/V1/carts` | Core; `checkout` in URL or cookie |
| `Magento_Customer` | `/rest/V1/customers`, `/rest/V1/integration/customer/token` | Core; `customer` in HTML |
| `Magento_Search` | `/rest/V1/search?searchCriteria[...]` | Core; Elasticsearch/OpenSearch backend |
| `Magento_Swatches` | Swatch data in product REST/GraphQL response | `swatch_data` key in product JSON |
| `Magento_LayeredNavigation` | Aggregation filters in `/rest/V1/search` response | `aggregations` key in search response |
| `Magento_Inventory` (MSI) | `/rest/V1/inventory/source-items`, stock data | Adobe Commerce + Magento 2.3+; `Magento_Inventory` in module list |
| `PageBuilder` (Adobe Commerce) | `/rest/V1/pagebuilder/` prefix; structured content JSON | `data-content-type` attributes in CMS HTML |
| `Magento_B2b` (Adobe Commerce) | `/rest/V1/company`, `/rest/V1/requisition-lists` | Enterprise only; `company` in GraphQL schema |
| Amasty extensions | Varies by module (e.g., `/rest/V1/amasty_*`) | `Amasty_` namespace in HTML JS includes |
| Mirasvit extensions | Varies (e.g., search, SEO modules) | `Mirasvit_` namespace in HTML JS includes |
| Aheadworks extensions | Varies (e.g., `/rest/V1/aw_*`) | `Aheadworks_` namespace in HTML JS includes |
| `Magento_Wishlist` | `/rest/V1/wishlist/` | `wishlist` in page HTML or JS component names |
| `Magento_GiftCard` (Adobe Commerce) | `/rest/V1/gift-cards/` | `giftcard` in HTML or checkout config |

## 8. Known Public Data

| Endpoint | Data | Notes |
|----------|------|-------|
| `/rest/V1/store/storeViews` | All store views: ID, code, website ID, name | Reveals multi-store topology |
| `/rest/V1/store/storeConfigs` | Base URL, locale, currency, timezone, weight unit per store | Critical for constants.md |
| `/rest/V1/directory/countries` | Full country list with ISO codes and regions | Useful for locale/region mapping |
| `/rest/V1/directory/currency` | Base currency code and allowed currencies | Reveals target markets |
| `/rest/V1/categories?rootCategoryId=2` | Full category tree from root | Reveals site taxonomy |
| `/rest/V1/search?searchCriteria[pageSize]=1` | One product result with full schema | Reveals custom attributes |
| `/rest/V1/cmsPage/search?searchCriteria[pageSize]=100` | CMS pages with IDs, titles, URLs | Reveals content structure |
| `/graphql` with `{ storeConfig { ... } }` | Store configuration via GraphQL | Same data as REST storeConfigs, different shape |
| `/graphql` with introspection | Full GraphQL schema | May be disabled in production |
| `/magento_version` | Version string and edition (Community/Enterprise) | Version fingerprint |
| `/sitemap.xml` | Sitemap index or product/category URLs | Enumeration of content |

## 9. Probe Checklist

Run these in order. Record result (200 / 401 / 403 / 404) for each.

- [ ] `HEAD /rest/V1/store/storeViews` — confirm REST API is accessible and get response headers
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/store/storeViews` — list store views; detect multi-store setup
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/store/storeConfigs` — store config (locale, currency, base_url, timezone)
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/directory/countries` — country list; confirm public API is open
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/directory/currency` — currency data
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/categories` — full category tree
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/search?searchCriteria[pageSize]=1` — product search; note if 401 (auth required)
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/products?searchCriteria[pageSize]=1` — direct product API; likely 401 without token
- [ ] `GET /rest/V1/cmsPage/search?searchCriteria[pageSize]=10` — CMS pages
- [ ] `POST /graphql` with `{"query":"{ __schema { types { name } } }"}` — GraphQL introspection check
- [ ] `POST /graphql` with `{"query":"{ storeConfig { store_code base_url locale base_currency_code } }"}` — store config via GraphQL
- [ ] `POST /graphql` with `{"query":"{ categories(filters: {}) { items { id name url_key } } }"}` — categories via GraphQL
- [ ] `GET /magento_version` — attempt version and edition detection
- [ ] Check `X-Magento-Tags`, `X-Magento-Cache-Id` in response headers for any endpoint
- [ ] `GET /rest/all/V1/store/storeViews` — check if `all` scope works (multi-store indicator)
- [ ] `GET /pub/static/` path from HTML — extract `version{N}` segment; check `requirejs-bundle-config.json`
- [ ] Inspect `window.require.s.contexts._` in browser JS — extract module map and base URL
- [ ] Inspect page HTML for `data-mage-init` attributes — reveals active JS components
- [ ] Check for `Amasty_`, `Mirasvit_`, `Aheadworks_` in HTML source — third-party extension detection
- [ ] `POST /rest/V1/integration/customer/token` with test credentials — verify auth endpoint shape (expect 401 with bad creds, not 404)

## 10. Gotchas

- **Store code in REST path.** The REST API base path can include a store code: `/rest/{store_code}/V1/`. Use `/rest/V1/` for the default store or `/rest/all/V1/` to hit all stores. If store code scoping is enforced, requests to `/rest/V1/` may return data for the default store only.
- **Products endpoint requires auth.** In most production Magento 2 configurations, `/rest/V1/products` returns `401 Unauthorized` without a Bearer token. Use `/rest/V1/search` (public) to enumerate products instead.
- **Static file versioning.** All static assets are under `/pub/static/version{N}/` where `{N}` is a deployment timestamp. This version number changes on every `bin/magento setup:static-content:deploy` run. Hardcoded paths will break after redeploy.
- **GraphQL introspection is often disabled.** Production stores frequently disable `__schema` introspection. Try the `storeConfig` query directly even if introspection fails.
- **form_key is required for AJAX.** All POST AJAX calls to Magento frontend controllers require the `form_key` CSRF token, typically passed as a POST parameter or in `X-Requested-With` + `form_key` body field. Without it, requests return redirect to cart or empty response.
- **Admin tokens expire.** Admin REST tokens expire after 4 hours by default (`oauth/access_token_lifetime/admin` config). Customer tokens have a separate, often longer TTL. Always handle 401 responses by re-acquiring the token.
- **Varnish caching layer.** Many production stores sit behind Varnish. A `X-Cache: HIT` or `Age:` header means the response is served from cache — you are NOT hitting the application. Vary cache-busting headers or use unique query parameters to probe the live app.
- **Multi-store scoping returns different data.** The same endpoint path under different store codes returns store-scoped prices, content, and currency. Always probe `/rest/V1/store/storeViews` first to enumerate all store codes, then probe critical endpoints under each.
- **Adobe Commerce (Enterprise) has extra APIs.** B2B modules add `/rest/V1/company`, `/rest/V1/negotiable-quote`, `/rest/V1/requisition-lists`. PageBuilder adds structured content JSON in CMS data. These are NOT present in Magento Open Source.
- **RequireJS, not ESM.** Magento 2 uses RequireJS (AMD modules) throughout. Do not expect `import`/`export` syntax in JS bundles. Module names map to file paths via the RequireJS config at `window.require.s.contexts._`.
- **Elasticsearch/OpenSearch is the search backend.** The `/rest/V1/search` endpoint proxies to Elasticsearch/OpenSearch. Query syntax uses `searchCriteria[filterGroups][0][filters][0][field]=name&searchCriteria[filterGroups][0][filters][0][value]=...`. Malformed criteria silently return empty results.
- **`/magento_version` endpoint may be blocked.** Some security-hardened stores block or remove this endpoint via nginx rules or a security module. A 404 or 403 here does not mean the site is not Magento — rely on header and HTML signals instead.
- **Two-factor authentication (2FA) affects admin API.** Magento 2.4+ enables 2FA for admin accounts by default. Admin REST token generation via `/rest/V1/integration/admin/token` will fail unless 2FA is disabled or a 2FA-bypass integration token is used.
